natto.name: Natto
natto.description: Traditional Japanese food made from fermented soybeans, the richest known source of Vitamin K2 (specifically MK-7).

sauerkraut.name: Sauerkraut
sauerkraut.description: Finely cut cabbage fermented by various lactic acid bacteria, containing Vitamin K1 and Vitamin K2 (MK-7) in small amounts.
